overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character leading a horse on foot through a natural landscape. The character walks from a grassy hillside with scattered trees down to a misty riverbank with rocky terrain. The scene features atmospheric fog rising from the water and a warm, natural color palette typical of the game's wilderness areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered trees and rock outcroppings

agents.ego_description: leading a brown and white horse by the reins through grassy terrain, approaching a misty river in the distance

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly beside the character, being led by a rope reins

entered.detail: large gray rock outcropping surrounded by grass and small vegetation
tall tree with green leafy canopy providing partial shade over the path
rolling terrain covered in green grass and wild plants

segments.scene_description: The character leads a horse through a sunlit grassy hillside. A large rock formation sits to the left while a prominent deciduous tree stands on the right. The terrain slopes gently downward toward a misty area visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty riverbank with rocky shoreline and scattered boulders

events.description: descends from grassy hillside to rocky riverbank where mist rises from the water surface

agents.ego_description: carefully leading the horse along the uneven rocky edge of a wide misty river

notable_agents.action: horse navigating the rocky terrain beside the character, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: wide body of water with atmospheric fog and mist hovering above the surface
uneven shoreline composed of dark rocks, boulders, and decaying wood
large weathered log lying horizontally among the rocks near the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a misty riverbank where fog rises from the water. The character leads the horse along the rocky shoreline, navigating past boulders and a fallen tree trunk. The grassy terrain gives way to gravel and rocks as the river stretches out to the right, with distant forests visible across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit grassy hillside down toward a misty, rocky riverbank. It begins with the character leading a horse past a large rock formation and a prominent deciduous tree as the terrain slopes gently downward. As the character descends, the bright hillside transitions into a dense fog that rises from the water's edge. The scene then shifts from soft grass to a rugged shoreline of gravel and boulders, navigating past a fallen tree trunk. Finally, the camera follows the pair along the rocky bank as the river expands to the right, revealing distant forests shrouded in mist across the water.
